name: Food Roll 3D Game
description: Food Roll is a new 3D running game you can play in your spare time. Flexible control of the ball to roll and keep swallowing the blocks, while consuming the blocks, avoid being swallowed by the big mouth. It's stimulating, you need to focus and react quickly to control your ball. Complete more challenges to unlock more skins and items, and keep trying to create a new score. See how far you can go in the Food Roll!
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Ball, Boy, Boys, Fun, H5, HTML5, Kid, Kids, run
